project.name: roadtripper
project.description: Road trip planner using Urban Explorer database with persona-based recommendations

current_phase.last_session_work: Session 2: Clerk v7 auth, Google Maps RouteMap component, CSP headers, dark design system, apphosting.yaml
current_phase.next_action: Session 3: Route input UI — city autocomplete, drive budget selector, Directions API integration

foundation: Next.js 16 project init with TypeScript + Tailwind
Firebase/Firestore connection to urbanexplorer named database
Google Maps API setup with route display
core: Route calculation via Google Maps Directions API
Stop recommendation engine (query waypoints within +/- 60 min of route)
Dynamic route recalculation on stop selection
personas: Persona selector UI (outdoorsman, foodie, gearhead, culture, nerd)
Persona-to-vibe mapping (Urban Explorer vibeClass + waypoint categories)
Filtered recommendations based on active persona
Persona-themed route line colors and markers
polish: Multi-day itinerary view with day dividers

completed_features: Google Maps RouteMap with Directions renderer
resume_instructions: Session 2 complete. Clerk v7 auth working (sign-in/out). RouteMap component renders Google Maps with Directions polyline (needs NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY in .env.local). CSP headers configured. Dark design system applied. Next: Session 3 — route input UI with city autocomplete and drive budget selector.
